strengths: Extensive hands-on software engineering background spanning nearly two decades, including experience with high-throughput microservices handling millions of requests per second.
Demonstrated architectural initiative as the founder of GISCollective, building an event-driven, open-source data platform.
Recent hands-on exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and Model Context Protocol (MCP) development.
concerns: Completely lacks the required 5+ years of senior technical leadership and executive experience, having exclusively held Individual Contributor (Senior/Staff) roles.
Shows no evidence of the mandatory track record in scaling engineering teams from 10 to 30+ people or structuring governance for outsourced engineering.
Fails to meet the hard requirement for production experience building multi-agent AI systems in regulated commercial environments, with AI exposure limited to a single one-month tenure.
response.justification: Bogdan is fundamentally misaligned with the executive and domain-specific requirements of this CTO role. While he is a highly experienced Individual Contributor with strong distributed systems skills, he completely lacks the mandated 5+ years of senior leadership experience, team scaling (10 to 30+ headcount), and board-level communication. Furthermore, his AI experience is limited to a recent one-month stint in developer tooling, falling drastically short of the hard requirement to architect and operate complex, multi-agent AI systems for high-stakes algorithmic fintech applications.
